clearRows() - Method in interface com.comp2042.model.board.Board
Checks the board for completed rows, removes them, shifts the remaining rows down, calculates the score bonus, and returns the results.
clearRows() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.board.SimpleBoard

pause() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.mode.TwoPlayerMode
 
PAUSE - Enum constant in enum class com.comp2042.event.EventType
Pauses the game, freezing all timers and gameplay.
